name: Pineapple Coconut Pie
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the crust, combine crumbs, margarine, and sugar in a mixing bowl. Press the mixture firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, spreading it evenly over the pie pan. Chill for 1 hour, or until firm. Alternatively, bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes or until edges are brown. Cool on a rack before filling.
To prepare the filling, completely dissolve the pineapple gelatin powder in boiling water. Stir in rum extract. Combine cold water and ice cubes to make 1 1/4 cups. Add the gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened. Remove any unmelted ice cubes. Fold in the whipped topping, pineapple, and coconut. Blend until smooth. Chill until the mixture mounds. Spoon into the crust and chill for 2 hours.
